en: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, have given your pledge for a stranger,
zh: 我兒，如果你作朋友的保證人， 替外人擊掌擔保；

en: if you are snared in the words of your mouth, caught in the words of your mouth,
zh: 如果你給自己口裡的話纏累， 給你口裡的話綁住；

en: then do this, my son, and save yourself, for you have come into the hand of your neighbor: go, hasten, and plead urgently with your neighbor.
zh: 我兒，既然你落在你朋友的手中， 就要這樣行，好解救你自己， 你要自己降卑，去懇求你的朋友。

en: Give your eyes no sleep and your eyelids no slumber;
zh: 不要讓你的眼睛睡覺， 不要容你的眼瞼打盹；

en: save yourself like a gazelle from the hand of the hunter, like a bird from the hand of the fowler.
zh: 要解救自己，像羚羊脫離獵人的手， 像飛鳥脫離捕鳥人的手。

en: Go to the ant, O sluggard; consider her ways, and be wise.
zh: 懶惰人哪！你去看看螞蟻， 察看牠們所行的，就可得著智慧。

en: Without having any chief, officer, or ruler,
zh: 螞蟻沒有元帥， 沒有官長，也沒有統治者，

en: she prepares her bread in summer and gathers her food in harvest.
zh: 尚且在夏天預備食物， 在收割的時候積聚糧食。

en: How long will you lie there, O sluggard? When will you arise from your sleep?
zh: 懶惰人哪，你要睡到幾時呢？ 你甚麼時候才睡醒呢？

en: A little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to rest,
zh: 再睡片時，打盹片時， 抱著手躺臥片時，

en: and poverty will come upon you like a robber, and want like an armed man.
zh: 你的貧窮就必像強盜來到， 你的缺乏就必像拿兵器的人來到。

en: A worthless person, a wicked man, goes about with crooked speech,
zh: 無賴漢、壞人 到處使用欺詐的口；

en: winks with his eyes, signals with his feet, points with his finger,
zh: 他以眼傳神，用腳示意， 用指頭指點，

en: with perverted heart devises evil, continually sowing discord;
zh: 心存乖謬，圖謀惡事， 常常散布紛爭。

en: therefore calamity will come upon him suddenly; in a moment he will be broken beyond healing.
zh: 因此，災難必忽然臨到， 他必突然毀滅，無法挽救。

en: There are six things that the LORD hates, seven that are an abomination to him:
zh: 耶和華恨惡的事有六樣， 連他心裡厭惡的，共有七樣，

en: haughty eyes, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood,
zh: 就是高傲的眼、 說謊的舌頭、 流無辜人血的手、

en: a heart that devises wicked plans, feet that make haste to run to evil,
zh: 圖謀惡事的心、 快跑行惡的腳、

en: a false witness who breathes out lies, and one who sows discord among brothers.
zh: 說謊的假證人， 和在弟兄中散布紛爭的人。

en: My son, keep your father's commandment, and forsake not your mother's teaching.
zh: 我兒，要謹守你父親的誡命， 不可離棄你母親的訓誨。

en: Bind them on your heart always; tie them around your neck.
zh: 要把它們常常繫在你的心上， 綁在你的頸項上。

en: When you walk, they will lead you; when you lie down, they will watch over you; and when you awake, they will talk with you.
zh: 你行走的時候，它們必引導你； 你睡覺的時候，它們必保護你； 你醒來的時候，它們必和你交談。

en: For the commandment is a lamp and the teaching a light, and the reproofs of discipline are the way of life,
zh: 因為誡命是燈，訓誨是光， 出於管教的責備是生命之道，

en: to preserve you from the evil woman, from the smooth tongue of the adulteress.
zh: 能保護你遠離邪惡的女人， 遠離妓女諂媚的舌頭。

en: Do not desire her beauty in your heart, and do not let her capture you with her eyelashes;
zh: 你心裡不要貪戀她的美色， 也不要給她的媚眼勾引。

en: for the price of a prostitute is only a loaf of bread, but a married woman hunts down a precious life.
zh: 因為妓女使人只剩一塊餅， 通姦的婦人 獵取人寶貴的生命。

en: Can a man carry fire next to his chest and his clothes not be burned?
zh: 如果人把火藏在懷裡， 他的衣服怎能不燒著呢？

en: Or can one walk on hot coals and his feet not be scorched?
zh: 如果人在火炭上行走， 他的腳怎能不灼傷呢？

en: So is he who goes in to his neighbor's wife; none who touches her will go unpunished.
zh: 凡是和別人的妻子通姦的，也是這樣； 凡是親近她的，都必不免受罰。

en: People do not despise a thief if he steals to satisfy his appetite when he is hungry,
zh: 盜賊因飢餓偷竊充飢， 人不會鄙視他。

en: but if he is caught, he will pay sevenfold; he will give all the goods of his house.
zh: 但如果他被捉住，就要七倍償還， 要把他家裡所有的財物都交出來。

en: He who commits adultery lacks sense; he who does it destroys himself.
zh: 和婦人通姦的，實在無知； 行這事的，是自我毀滅。

en: Wounds and dishonor will he get, and his disgrace will not be wiped away.
zh: 他必遭受擊打，被凌辱， 他的恥辱永不能塗抹。

en: For jealousy makes a man furious, and he will not spare when he takes revenge.
zh: 因為嫉妒激起了丈夫的烈怒， 使他在報仇的時候，必不留情。

en: He will accept no compensation; he will refuse though you multiply gifts.
zh: 任何賠償，他都不接受， 縱使你餽送許多禮物，他也不肯罷休。
